design_philosophy: A highly polished, premium corporate holding company landing page. Dark mode with extremely low-light backgrounds, sharp 1px borders, subtle light bleeds, and zero unnecessary visual clutter. Authority is conveyed through restrained monochrome palettes, stark typography, and deep negative space.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass - backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with a delicate border-b border-white/10. Sticky at the top.
surface_strategies.brand_cards: Grid Borders - Flat background (#0A0A0A), 1px solid border (border-white/10). On hover, border-white/30 with a subtle -translate-y-1 lift and a very soft box-shadow glow.
surface_strategies.buttons: Neumorphic/Tactile - Sharp rectangular buttons. Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200. Secondary (Visit Links): bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-all duration-300.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark architecture. Use in the Charlotte LLC Hero Section with a heavy overlay (e.g., bg-black/70) so white text stands out perfectly.

brand_charlotte_telecom.description: Fiber optic wires. Use as a subtle background or header image for the Charlotte Telecommunications card.

brand_spy_lu.description: Dark, moody server rack. Use as visual for the spy.lu offshore hosting card.

brand_snow_gg.description: Modern data center/server rack. Use as visual for the snow.gg performance hosting card.

motion_and_interactions.page_load: Subtle fade-in and slide-up (translate-y-4 to 0) for hero text and brand cards using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly. Links have an underline expansion or background color invert.
motion_and_interactions.language_toggle: Smooth color crossfade between EN and FR active states.

content_structure.navigation: Logo (Charlotte LLC text in Outfit, font-bold, tracking-tight). Links: Brands, About. Language Toggle (EN/FR).
content_structure.hero_section: H1 (Charlotte LLC), Subheadline explaining the management of tech infrastructure outside EMEA. No contact form.
content_structure.portfolio_section: Section heading 'Our Brands'. 3-column Bento grid. Each card contains: Brand name (H3), short description, 3 stats/badges styled with JetBrains Mono, and a 'VISIT [DOMAIN]' external CTA button.
content_structure.about_section: Details on Kentucky LLC registration and EMEA exclusion. Minimalist text layout, huge typography.
content_structure.footer: Legal info, copyright, minimal links. Generous py-24 spacing.

testing_attributes.guideline: ALL interactive elements must use data-testid.

instructions_to_main_agent: Create the app as a single-page application (marketing site).
Implement state for the language toggle (EN/FR) which changes the text content of the page.
Do NOT use typical Shadcn Card components for the brand showcase; build custom raw HTML/Tailwind divs with exact 1px border and hover effects to maintain the premium Archetype 5 feel.
Ensure the hero background image has a max overlay opacity of bg-black/60 to let the abstract architecture bleed through without compromising text legibility.
Apply `data-testid` to every interactive element as specified.
Install `framer-motion` for page load and hover animations.
Ensure Google Fonts (Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono) are imported in the global CSS.
